title: Vanilla Vibes
body:
🌟 Vanilla… but More Alive, More Fun, More Adventure
This modpack keeps Minecraft feeling classic while making the whole world richer and more exciting. Explore upgraded terrain, improved structures, new gear, and a more intense Ender Dragon fight. Every creature — mobs, animals, even players — now has fresh new animations that make the world feel truly alive.

Travel in style with small sailing ships, snow sleds, and enhanced elytra flight with barrel rolls. Grow new crops, cook real meals and drinks, and decorate your home with furniture. Helpful QoL upgrades and a gravestone system make gameplay smoother without losing the vanilla feel.

It’s the Minecraft you love — just better, livelier, and way more fun to play.

_Might experience minor bugs due to keybinds/texture packs conflicting, these issues are easy to fix manually_
